item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: It's time for a Funny Friday dump! End your work week with some laughs
item.description:
Hello and it's time for another Funny Friday post, where we try to end the work week on a humorous note, with good times and laughter. As always, there's a link in the comments to a private folder with some stuff so that puritanical mods don't go after the whole post. Make sure to check it out... as long as you're not at work or anyplace it might cause you problems. Now, on with the funny!
Gmail is disgusted by the weakness of your flesh
Yep
The moment when you realize you really aren't that guy.
*Bows to King Tundra*
Cats are the fun and wild child, while dogs are the simple kids who need some extra care?
Spoilers!
It's a difficult duty, but on behalf of everyone who can't do it, I promise to vibe, chill, and do the fun things you don't have time for.
I don't have a cat and my dog died back in 2023, so this is the closest you get to a cat or dog tax. Hope you had fun along the way and have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Coming home
item.description: Eight-year-old Liza Ostapenko, from a rural border settlement in Chernihiv region, greets Ukrainian Defenders returning from Russian captivity - in any weather, at any time of day, in every season. Whenever Liza learns about a prisoner exchange, she runs to the road near her home with a Ukrainian flag.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Friday from TheFreePizzaDude everyone! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
Kevin woke up to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1230 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 115 5th by Pizza Angel @PepperoniAndFingernailPizza 155 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 230 10th, 11th, 12th, 13th and 14th by Pizza Angel @weasel 245 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th by @OP 305 19th, 20th and 21st by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 400 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @Weasel 600 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @OneFustyWeeDram 630 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 700 31st, 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @Jaenen ... Today's Grocery Tally 130 1st by Grocery Angel @PepperoniAndFingernailPizza 230 2nd by Grocery Angel @Weasel
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.dc:creator: thornedrose27

item.title: Losing good people:
item.description: On March 3rd, around 21:00, our M113 evacuation vehicle was struck by a succession of FPV drones. Den was driving. He was our comrade, our warrior, and our beloved legendary M113 driver. Den was the one who carried the wounded out in that M113 when others refused the task. Night after night, he drove routes of unspeakable risk. He knew exactly what the risk was every time that engine started. He went anyway, because someone out there needed to be brought home alive. Supplies needed to be delivered. The work had to be done. On that night the drones kept coming. The vehicle was hit again and again. Den did not survive. War has a way of taking people who should have had decades left to live. Den should still be here. Instead we are left with the silence that follows a loss like this. I keep thinking about the simple truth that behind every evacuation vehicle, every mission, every report written after the fact, there is a person inside who chose to go. Den chose to go. He will be missed far more than words can properly say. Rest easy, Den. We will carry your memory with us. Source: https://x.com/bekamaciorowski/status/2029892635192639981 Also on ig: https://www.instagram.com/bekamaciorowskiii/
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @slimvictor made this dog on the beach!
27 Man Tax: David Strathairn
“Every individual has a place to fill in the world, and is important, in some respect, whether he chooses to be so or not.” - Nathaniel Hawthorne So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
